hudson.tasks.Shell.command:
echo "------------------------Starting zip process------------------------" BUILD_FILE_NAME="${JOB_NAME}_${BUILD_NUMBER}.zip"
chmod 777 build.sh
./build.sh ${BUILD_FILE_NAME} echo exit code $?
echo "Zip is fnished - `pwd`/${BUILD_FILE_NAME}"

echo "------------------------Uploading build to nexus------------------------"
BUILD_FILE_NAME="${JOB_NAME}_${BUILD_NUMBER}.zip"
mvn deploy:deploy-file -DgroupId=${PACKAGE} -DartifactId=${ARTIFACT} -Dversion=${VERSION} -Durl=${NEXUS_URL}/${REPO_ID} -Dfile=${BUILD_FILE_NAME} -DrepositoryId=releases -Dclassifier=${BUILD_NUMBER}
if [ $? -eq 0 ] then echo "Upload to Nexus finished fine" exit 0 else echo "Upload to Nexus failed,removing the zip" rm -f ${BUILD_FILE_NAME} exit 1 fi

echo "------------------------Uploading build to deployment manager------------------------"
BUILD_FILE_NAME="${JOB_NAME}_${BUILD_NUMBER}.zip" SIZE=$(du -h ${BUILD_FILE_NAME} | awk '{print $1}')
echo ${PACKAGE} STATUS=1 PACKAGE_NAME=${BUILD_FILE_NAME} VERSION_ID="${MONGO_VERSION_ID}" NEW_PACKAGE=`echo ${PACKAGE} | sed s/\\\./\\\//g` RELATIVE_PATH="${REPO_ID}/${NEW_PACKAGE}/${ARTIFACT}/${VERSION}" ADDITIONAL_INFO="{\"version\" : \"${VERSION}\",\"package\" : \"${PACKAGE}\",\"artifact\" : \"${ARTIFACT}\",\"repo_id\" : \"${REPO_ID}\",\"relative_path\" : \"${RELATIVE_PATH}\",\"file_name\" : \"${ARTIFACT}-${VERSION}-${BUILD_NUMBER}.zip\"}" FILE_PATH="${NEXUS_URL}/${REPO_ID}/${NEW_PACKAGE}/${ARTIFACT}/${VERSION}/${ARTIFACT}-${VERSION}-${BUILD_NUMBER}.zip" ADD_BUILD_URL=${DP_MANAGER_URL}/versions/build/add JSON="{\"status\" : \"${STATUS}\", \"build_number\" : \"${BUILD_NUMBER}\", \"package_name\" : \"${PACKAGE_NAME}\",\"package_type\":\"zip\",\"version_id\" : \"${VERSION_ID}\",\"type\" : \"url\",\"file_path\" : \"${FILE_PATH}\",\"file_size\" : \"${SIZE}\",\"repo_type\" : \"nexus\",\"additional_info\" :${ADDITIONAL_INFO}}" echo ${NEW_PACKAGE}
RESULT=$(echo ${JSON} | curl -k --silent --output /dev/stderr --write-out "%{http_code}" -H "Content-Type: application/json" --request POST --data @- ${ADD_BUILD_URL})
if [ $RESULT -eq 200 ] then echo "curl -k command passed, removing the ${BUILD_FILE_NAME}" rm -f ${BUILD_FILE_NAME} else echo "curl -k command failed,removing the ${BUILD_FILE_NAME}" rm -f ${BUILD_FILE_NAME} exit 1 fi
